title: Baobab Museum of Science
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Baobab Museum of Science''' was established by [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]] and supported by the [[Baobab Archives]]. The institution boasted many impressive artifacts, including the recently retrieved and restored [[Great Heep]]. A former member of the institution was the infamous droid torturer [[Professor/Legends|Professor]] [[Cantebarius H. Broom]], who was motivated by paranoia of droids due in large part to discoveries made during research of the Great Heep, most notably that it was a member of the [[Abominor]] race of sentient droids and that no less than eighteen of them, including the Great Heep, were existent in the galaxy.

{{Loc-stub}}
